title: La feria de las flores
writer: Rafael M. Saavedra, José Benavides hijo
actors: Antonio Badú, María Luisa Zea, Estela Inda
plot: Valentin is an adventurous man, a thief looking for justice, he is in love with a woman of society and they want to marry in secret, but the situation gets complicated and the police interfere with his relationship.
